import "./ContactUs.css"; import Footer from "../../Components/Footer/Footer"; import Navbar from "../../Components/Navbar/navbar"; import Aos from "aos"; import "aos/dist/aos.css"; import React, { useEffect } from "react"; function ContactUs() { useEffect(() => { Aos.init({ duration: 2000 }); window.scrollTo(0, 0); }, []); return (
